header.tagline: The avenue that connects everyone — operations for professional businesses

hero.titleBlessing: With God's help we will act and succeed
hero.subtitle: One platform connecting CRM, documents, billing and control—with AI Hub, app builder and an idea engine inside the workflow.

features.title: CRM that moves work forward
features.body: Clients, tasks, reminders and statuses in one place—without jumping between tools.

features.title: Billing & business documents
features.body: Invoices, collections, subscriptions and cash flow inside the same workspace.

features.title: AI Hub & idea engine
features.body: Chat, notebook and app builder — forms, dashboards, Composer, and natural-language CRM, documents and scan actions.

mock.suggestTitle: 7 documents identified and ready to auto-assign
mock.suggestBody: The system detected clients, amounts and statuses and suggests the next step for each item.
mock.demoNavHint: Click a sidebar icon to explore the demo

crm.title: Clients & tasks
items: Ramat Aviv residential project — pending approval
Follow-up call scheduled today at 4:00 PM

documents.title: Documents & scans
documents.lead: Recently identified documents ready for action.
items: Subcontract — signed, saved to project file

analytics.title: Insights & decisions
analytics.lead: Key trends from the past week.
items: Task load down 12% vs. last week

settings.title: Organization settings
settings.lead: Central configuration — without leaving the OS.

modulesSection.label: One product, clear work layers
modulesSection.title: Every module serves the process—not a standalone screen.
modulesSection.body: BSD-YBM doesn't sell a feature list. It builds a flow: intake, processing, action, collections and control.

modules.title: Smart documents
modules.body: Scan, extract, classify and create documents from real business activity.

modules.title: Operational control
modules.body: Tasks, follow-ups, internal processes and action items in one clear place.

modules.title: Management insights
modules.body: A live picture of revenue, load, exceptions and opportunities—without detached reports.

modules.title: AI Hub & builder
modules.body: Org chat, notebook, app builder and platform actions — KPIs, forms and shortcuts on one screen.

workflow.label: Live workflow
workflow.title: What happens the moment new information enters the system?
workflow.lead: Instead of a team gluing processes manually, BSD-YBM connects data, suggests action, and records everything in real time.
workflow.stepSub: The next work layer updates automatically so the team always sees what changed and what should happen now.
steps: A client or document enters the system
BSD-YBM detects context, tasks and risks
The system updates CRM, documents and billing
The team gets a live picture and a suggested next action

industries.label: Industry fit
industries.title: Construction, site and company ops—in one system.
industries.body: Contractors, developers, project managers and construction firms need control over projects, documents, clients and cash—from the field and site office through company management.

why.label: Why it works
why.title: The system thinks like an operations environment—not a pile of screens.

rows.title: Single source of truth
rows.body: Clients, documents, tasks, billing and insights share one operational picture.

rows.title: One language
rows.body: The team doesn't learn five different tools to move work forward.

rows.title: Contextual AI
rows.body: Idea engine, drafts and CRM/document actions from your org data—not a generic chatbot.

proofPoints: Fewer duplicates across CRM, documents and billing
Consistent tracking of tasks and collections

principles.lead: Three principles that guide the product—without marketing fluff.

items.title: Connected, not stacked
items.body: Every module serves the same workflow. The goal is to move information between steps without copy-paste.

items.title: Operational transparency
items.body: What came in, what changed and what is waiting—visible to the team, not scattered across files and chats.

items.title: AI as assistant
items.body: The system suggests and drafts—you decide, with full context from your data.

modularity.lead: Turn on only what you need — and connect tools you already use, without replacing everything at once.

items.title: Activate on demand
items.body: CRM, documents, billing, AI and control — each module switches on separately, by org size and maturity.

items.title: Plugs into existing systems
items.body: Sync with Google Calendar, email, storage and ops tools — data flows through one source of truth.

items.title: Same core, flexible extensions
items.body: Add capabilities, roles and workflows without breaking what already runs — built for growth and change.

plans.label: Plans & signup
plans.title: A clear path for every stage—with direct signup.
plans.body: Each tier is wired to signup, scan quotas and in-product subscription management. Start free, pick a plan, or talk to us for larger rollouts.

cta.label: Ready to work differently?
cta.title: Move from scattered tools to one command center.
cta.body: Start with an account, connect the flows that matter, and get a workspace that fits your complexity.

cinematic.previewBanner: Preview — experimental marketing page. The main homepage is at the root URL.

bentoAppBuilder.body: Describe any idea — forms, dashboards, Composer with KPIs and action buttons, or CRM and scan commands.

osLanding.heroSubtitle: An AI-powered command center. Projects, finance and clients on autopilot — designed for 2026.

features.title: AI document scanner
features.body: Automatic extraction from invoices with advanced vision, straight into your database.

features.title: Gemini Live
features.body: A voice assistant to command and navigate the workspace with natural speech.

features.title: AI Hub & builder
features.body: Chat, notebook and app builder — builds custom UI or runs platform automations.

features.title: Unified ERP & CRM
features.body: Visual project board, budgets and cash flow under one roof.

features.title: Digital signature
features.body: Branded quotes sent to clients for fast, secure signing.

editorial.heroLead: One OS connecting site, office, clients and documents — CRM and ERP with a modular AI layer, built for construction and trades.
editorial.featuredLead: Clients, documents and money — one status picture per project, from quote to supplier invoice.
editorial.footerContactBlurb: Want a demo or enterprise rollout? Let’s talk.
